'''Lorac''' was the [[king]] of the [[Planet/Legends|planet]] [[Velmor/Legends|Velmor]] during the era of the rise of the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Galactic Empire]]. The husband of [[Queen/Legends|Queen]] [[Denira]], Lorac fathered two sons, the crown [[Prince/Legends|prince]] [[Denid]] and his younger brother [[Anod]].<ref name="marvel49" /> In [[17 BBY/Legends|17 BBY]], the Empire hatched a coup against Lorac after finding that the king held rebel sympathies,<ref name="wotc" /> fomenting a mob to [[Great Revolt|storm the palace]] and [[Death/Legends|kill]] the king and his wife. Denid was forced to flee into [[Exile (punishment)/Legends|exile]], while Anod remained behind as the new, Imperial-aligned crown prince.<ref name="marvel49" />

==Behind the scenes==
Lorac was first mentioned in [[Star Wars (1977) 49|''Star Wars'' (1977) 49]], written by [[Mike W. Barr]] and released in [[1981]].<ref name="marvel49" />
